_comment: Reproduces Table 4 (tab:cal-comparison): calibration × crowd/emp ablation on FB A∪B. Uses the v7-migrated _calibrated_global / _calibrated_hier sibling configs (rather than re-fitting via the new calibrate.py) so numbers match the paper exactly. ZS rows use the 'pro-high-none-...' configs; ZS+crowd+emp uses the -halawi variant since that's the only run we have.
